stemHtml: What is recommended to do to enhance brake life in relation to brake wear?

options.a: For both carbon and steel brakes - use differential braking to reduce brake temperatures.
options.b: For carbon brakes - use a large number of small brake applications during taxi.
options.c: For steel brakes - use a large number of small brake applications during taxi.
options.d: For steel brakes - use a single, firm brake application during taxi.
